label: Retail advantage
heading: Benefits for retailers
description: Eagle Glass was built with one mission: give retailers a screen protector that outsells, outshines, and outperforms everything else on the shelf.

cards.title: Higher margins with faster turnover
cards.description: Premium positioning drives higher per-unit profit while best-in-class quality keeps customers coming back.

cards.title: A truly premium product your customers trust
cards.description: 6-layer reinforced glass with flawless clarity — a product that sells itself on the shelf.

cards.title: Never out of stock - backed by our deep inventory
cards.description: Reliable supply chain and dedicated stock levels mean you never miss a sale.
